text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin reflects on the many ways she differs
from her friends—from their upbringings,
attitudes toward life, and running styles, down to
their reasons for running and why others support
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me she runs because that's what she
wants to do, and I tell her that's reason enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My plain and simple encouragement gets through
to her. I know well that my support will help her.
It's time for us to enjoy the autumn Tenno Sho to
the fullest!
